title: Find Two Non-overlapping Sub-arrays Each With Target Sum
hints: Consider finding all minimal-length subarrays that sum to target. How can you efficiently locate these candidates as you scan the array?
Use a sliding window to find the shortest valid subarray ending at each index. Store these lengths in an auxiliary array for quick lookup.
For each valid subarray ending at i, pair it with the shortest valid subarray ending before it starts. Maintain a running minimum of previous valid lengths.
